query:
WITH RECURSIVE descendants AS (
        SELECT id
        FROM nodes
        WHERE id = $1
        UNION ALL
        SELECT n.id
        FROM nodes n
        INNER JOIN descendants d ON n.parent_id = d.id
      )
      UPDATE nodes SET 
        deleted_at = $2, 
        updated_at = $2
      WHERE
        id IN (SELECT id FROM descendants)
        AND deleted_at IS NULL
